name: Ruby Apple Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost pie crust, if frozen, and set aside.
2. Combine remaining ingredients, except fructose or substitute, in a large bowl until blended.
3. Spoon half of the apple-fruit mixture into a 9-inch nonstick cake or pie pan.
4. Sprinkle evenly with fructose or substitute.
5. Spoon the remaining fruit mixture on top.
6. Arrange the pie crust over the fruit mixture (stretching gently, if necessary, to fit).
7. Make 6 or 7 slits with the tip of a pointed knife.
8. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven until the crust is golden, about 30 minutes.
9. Serve warm or cold.
